searchSitePlaceholder.message: Tafuta jina la tovuti au URL

appDescription.message: Kiendelezi cha kivinjari cha FitShield ambacho hukusaidia kukumbuka utoaji wa chakula na kuagiza chakula haraka.

siteOpenTimeHint.message: Chagua muda ambao tovuti zitakaa wazi baada ya kipima muda kuisha.

timerDurationHint.message: Rekebisha muda uliosalia kabla ya Endelea kuonekana.

scheduleDefaultSummary.message: Kuzuia kutafuata ratiba yako ya kila siku wakati hii imewashwa.

popupBlockerSubtitle.message: Washa au zima kila orodha ya block.

popupMetadataSubtitle.message: Zuia vikundi vizima vya tovuti kulingana na nchi au kategoria ya chakula.

popupScheduleLabel.message: Zuia tu wakati wa saa zilizopangwa

popupScheduleSubtitle.message: Inatumika kwa bajeti ya chakula, kuagiza usiku wa manane, au saa za kazi.

popupCustomSubtitle.message: Ongeza tovuti zako na uzizima kibinafsi.

statusAllDisabled.message: Kizuia kimewashwa, lakini kila tovuti maalum imezimwa. Fungua Mipangilio ili kuwasha tena tovuti zingine.

statusBypassActive.message: Pasi ya muda inatumika. Kuzuia kunaendelea tena katika $1.

statusOutsideSchedule.message: Blocker ina silaha, lakini nje ya saa zilizopangwa. Itazuia kutoka $1.

deliverySitesEnabledCount.message: $1 za tovuti za utoaji za $2 zimewezeshwa.

fastFoodSitesEnabledCount.message: $1 ya tovuti za vyakula vya haraka vya $2 zimewezeshwa.

warningIntro.message: Ingia kabla ya kuagiza. Njaa, urahisi, dhiki, na tabia inaweza kuhisi sawa kwa sasa.

warningHintLocked.message: Kipima muda kinapoisha, unaweza kuendelea hadi kwenye tovuti ya $1 $2.

warningErrorHint.message: Hitilafu fulani imetokea wakati wa kufungua tovuti. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

warningUnlockHint.message: Unaweza kutembelea tovuti sasa. Kizuizi kitarudi kiotomatiki baada ya $1 $2.

scheduledHoursHint.message: Zuia tu wakati wa dirisha la kila siku.

customizeBlocklistIntro.message: Chagua ni vikundi vipi vilivyojengewa ndani vinavyotumika, washa au uzime tovuti mahususi, na uongeze vikoa vyako mwenyewe.

customUrlsSettingsSubtitle.message: Ongeza vikoa vyako na uzime kibinafsi.

fastFoodToggleTitle.message: Washa uzuiaji wa tovuti ya chakula cha haraka

deliveryToggleTitle.message: Washa uzuiaji wa tovuti ya uwasilishaji

customNoMatch.message: Hakuna URL maalum zinazolingana na utafutaji huu.

customNormalizeHint.message: Maingizo yanarekebishwa kwa vikoa na kuzuiwa kwenye kurasa zote.

invalidUrlNotice.message: Hiyo URL haionekani kuwa halali bado. Jaribu kikoa kama example.com.

emptyDeliverySearch.message: Hakuna tovuti za uwasilishaji zinazolingana na utafutaji huu.

emptyFastFoodSearch.message: Hakuna tovuti za vyakula vya haraka zinazolingana na utafutaji huu.

addedToBlocklist.message: $1 iliongezwa kwenye orodha maalum ya kuzuia.

removedFromBlocklist.message: $1 iliondolewa kutoka kwa orodha maalum ya kuzuia.

alreadyOnBlocklist.message: $1 tayari iko kwenye orodha ya waliozuiwa, kwa hivyo imewashwa tena.

metadataIntro.message: Zuia vikundi vizima vya tovuti kulingana na nchi ambayo chapa inafanyia kazi au aina ya chakula inachotoa. Vitalu hivi vinaongeza kwenye tovuti yako iliyopo na vizuizi maalum-URL.

blockByCountryHint.message: Tafuta kwa jina la nchi au msimbo, k.m. "United" au "US". Kuwezesha nchi huzuia kila chapa inayotumika huko.

countryQuickEmpty.message: Washa nchi kutoka kwa utafutaji ili kuibandika hapa.

blockByCategoryHint.message: Tafuta aina kama burger, pizza, au coffee. Utaalam unaweza kutafutwa pia; block inatumika kwa kategoria.

noCategoriesMatch.message: Hakuna kategoria zinazolingana na utafutaji huo.

noCountriesMatch.message: Hakuna nchi zinazolingana na utafutaji huo.

categoryQuickEmpty.message: Washa aina kutoka kwa utafutaji ili kuibandika hapa.

languageHint.message: Tafuta lugha na uchague. Chagua chaguo-msingi ya Mfumo ili kufuata kivinjari chako.

languageIntro.message: Chagua lugha ambayo FitShield hutumia kwa skrini zake yenyewe. Hii inabatilisha lugha ya kivinjari chako kwa kiendelezi pekee.

noLanguagesMatch.message: Hakuna lugha zinazolingana na utafutaji huo.

mbChipRemoveAria.message: Ondoa $1 kutoka kwa ufikiaji wa haraka

mbChipRemoveTitle.message: Ondoa njia ya mkato kutoka kwa ufikiaji wa haraka

systemThemeHint.message: Upendeleo wa kifaa au hali isiyobadilika.

supportFooterText.message: Ikiwa FitShield ilikusaidia kuepuka agizo la uwasilishaji lisilo la lazima, usaidizi wa hiari husaidia kuweka orodha zilizozuiwa na hati kusonga mbele.

backupIntro.message: Save your FitShield settings to a file, or restore them on another device. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

importErrorNotice.message: That file isn't a valid FitShield backup.

protectionStatusIntro.message: A local snapshot of what FitShield is protecting. Nothing here is uploaded.

avgMealCostHint.message: Used to estimate what you've saved by skipping orders. Stored on your device only.

resetIntro.message: Restore parts of FitShield to their defaults. Each action asks for confirmation first.

resetBlockingHint.message: Timers, schedule, site toggles, custom URLs, and country/category blocks.

resetPreferencesHint.message: Average meal cost and the saved-money counter.

factoryResetHint.message: Erase everything and return FitShield to a fresh install.

confirmResetBlocking.message: Reset all blocking settings to their defaults? Your theme, language, and saved stats are kept.

confirmResetAppearance.message: Reset the theme and appearance to the default dark mode?

confirmResetPreferences.message: Reset recipe preferences, the average meal cost, and the saved-money counter?

confirmFactoryReset.message: Factory reset FitShield? This erases all settings, custom sites, and stats on this device. This cannot be undone.

recipeChoiceNote.message: Nice choice — logged in your stats. See it in Settings.

avgMealCaloriesHint.message: Used to estimate calories avoided when you pick a recipe instead. Stored on your device only.

reorderCardLabel.message: Reorder card: $1. Use arrow keys to move it.

welcomeSubtitle.message: A few quick choices and you're set. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

welcomeLangBody.message: This sets the language for FitShield's popup, settings, and block screen.

welcomeThemeBody.message: You can fine-tune colors later in Settings.

welcomeFastFoodBody.message: Adds a pause screen on major fast-food chains' ordering pages.

welcomeDeliveryBody.message: Adds a pause screen on delivery platforms like DoorDash and Uber Eats.

welcomeImportBody.message: Coming from another device? Import a FitShield settings file to bring everything over. Otherwise just continue.

welcomeHelpBody.message: A quick tour of the main features.

welcomeFeaturePauseBody.message: When you hit a blocked site, a short countdown runs before you can continue — enough to rethink the order.

welcomeFeatureScheduleBody.message: Optionally block only during set hours, like evenings or work time.

welcomeFeatureWhitelistBody.message: Turn off any individual site, add your own custom URLs, or grant a temporary pass when you really need it.

welcomeFeatureRecipeBody.message: The block screen suggests a quick vegetarian and a meat/protein recipe based on what you blocked.

whatsNewSubtitle.message: A quick look at what changed.
